formula_allocation.txt1: Total Time Required to Allocate Breakdowns

formula.downtime_title: Formula Details: Total equipment downtime during failure
formula.downtime_note: Note: Indicates the degree of operational disruption. The higher the number → the less stable the system.
formula.mtbf_title: Formula Details: (Total Uptime - Total Downtime) / Number of Breakdowns
formula.mtbf_note: Note: The higher the MTBF → the more reliable the equipment.
formula.mttr_title: Formula Details: Total Downtime / Number of Breakdowns
formula.mttr_note: Note: The lower the MTTR → the faster the maintenance capability.
formula.spend_title: Formula Details: Total Actual Maintenance Time
formula.spend_note: Note: Evaluates the resources used in maintenance.
